form.formComment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing third over 680m at Geelong. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing third over 680m at Geelong. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Failed to finish the race over 400m at Geelong on April 1. Capable of taking this out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to finish the race over 400m at Geelong on April 1. Capable of taking this out.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Collided entering turn off back straight, fell and checked.

form.formComment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a sixth over 450m at Shepparton. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has struggled to jump cleanly in recent outings and the results have been disappointing, the most recent effort a sixth over 450m at Shepparton. Has failed to show enough to come into contention.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 650m at Shepparton beaten 10 lengths (37.99) behind Midnight Phantom in a Restricted WIN on April 13. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 7th over 650m at Shepparton beaten 10 lengths (37.99) behind Midnight Phantom in a Restricted WIN on April 13. Below best last time but looks well placed here. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (26.06) over 450m at Warrnambool. Worth including.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (26.06) over 450m at Warrnambool. Worth including.

form.formComment: Dropping back in distance from his last start when fourth over 600m at The Meadows. Hasn't shown a lot over this trip to date. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Dropping back in distance from his last start when fourth over 600m at The Meadows. Hasn't shown a lot over this trip to date. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids at box rise and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 425m in 24.51. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fourth over 450m at Shepparton at T3 RSTW level. Not suited by wide draw, prepared to risk.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Galloped on in back straight before faltered and tailed off.
